description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image globally and node:8 for the build-project job, with a global cache of node_modules. Define a build-project job (default stage) that runs the exact shell commands: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release", produces artifacts of coverage/, doc/ and dist/ that expire in 1 day and captures line coverage with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, executes ls -l, creates a .public directory, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in 90 days.
